details:
Date: March 23-31, 2026
    Batch 6 Winners will be announced on March 31.
    
    Upload many content about Vinzz Tools only for more chance of winning!
    —————————————————————
    Requirements:
     1. Follow Vinzz.
     2. In your caption, tag me "@vinzzzml".
     3. Hashtags Required:
     #vinzztools
     #injector
     —————————————————————
     Rewards:
      1. Best content: 500 diamonds💎
      2. Excellent content: 300 diamonds💎
      3. Great content: 100 diamonds💎
      4. Good content: 5-50 diamonds💎
      
     Note:
      1. Content must be related to Vinzz Tools only.
      2. Don't forget to tag me. Otherwise, your content may be ignored.
      3. Please do not steal other people's content.
